name: Test Page
description: RBAC and CRUD test harness for Playwright e2e testing
details: Interactive page that exercises create/read/update/delete operations against a test collection. Shows connection status, user role, and operation results. Used by Playwright tests to verify real data flow with data-testid selectors.
instructions: Add to schemas.ts: import { testItemsSchema } from './schemas/test-items-schema'
